hero.title: Anime Limitless Wiki
hero.description: Anime Limitless is a Roblox anime RPG where you fight to grow stronger, unlock unique Souls, explore islands, defeat bosses, and build your own anime character path.

gameFeature.title: Anime Limitless Gameplay
gameFeature.description: Explore surreal biomes, fuse items with Apotheosis, and survive strange creatures in this dreamlike voxel sandbox on Steam.

animeLimitlessCodes.title: Anime Limitless Codes
animeLimitlessCodes.intro: Use the Anime Limitless code list to claim free rewards and start progression faster. Redeem normal codes in the menu and use the community reward key at the West City NPC.

steps.title: Redeem RELEASE in the Codes menu
steps.description: Open Menu > Codes, enter RELEASE exactly, and claim 20 minutes of x2 Stat EXP.

steps.title: Claim LIMITLESSGIFT at the Gojo NPC
steps.description: Travel to West City and use LIMITLESSGIFT at the Community Reward Gojo NPC for Boss Essences and spins.

steps.title: Separate active and expired entries
steps.description: Use active rewards first, and keep expired entries only as historical references for future reactivation checks.

quickTips: Redeem codes before long farming sessions to maximize boosted time.
If a code fails, re-check capitalization and server state.
Community reward keys can use a different redeem flow from normal menu codes.
Track your last verification date so outdated code claims are easy to spot.

animeLimitlessBeginnerGuide.title: Anime Limitless Beginner Guide
animeLimitlessBeginnerGuide.intro: Anime Limitless early progression focuses on combat training, quests, Soul timing, and careful resource use. Start simple, then scale toward boss loops once your build is stable.

cards.name: Redeem rewards before combat
cards.description: Activate free rewards first so every early fight gives stronger value.

cards.name: Train through active fights
cards.description: Stat growth is fastest when you keep clearing enemies and practicing ability rotations.

cards.name: Follow quest and island pacing
cards.description: Use quest progression to avoid jumping into enemies that outscale your build.

cards.name: Protect Race and Trait spins
cards.description: Save rerolls for clear upgrades instead of burning them randomly in early game.

milestones: Use your first EXP boost window
Clear your first stable quest route
Pick a usable Soul for your build
Prepare for your first boss loop

animeLimitlessSoulsGuide.title: Anime Limitless Souls Guide
animeLimitlessSoulsGuide.intro: Souls are a major build system in Anime Limitless and are best treated as timed objectives instead of random pickups. Route your farming around spawn windows to avoid missed value.

items.name: Spawn Timer
items.description: Souls typically spawn every 30 minutes, so track each cycle while you grind.

items.name: Despawn Window
items.description: Souls can despawn after around 20 minutes, so collect quickly once confirmed.

items.name: Build Impact
items.description: Choose Souls that directly improve your main farming and bossing patterns.

items.name: Collection Order
items.description: Prioritize available upgrades now, then replace lower-value Souls as better options appear.

items.name: Update Tracking
items.description: Review official channels after patches for Soul changes and new additions.

animeLimitlessRaceAndTraitTierList.title: Anime Limitless Race and Trait Tier List
animeLimitlessRaceAndTraitTierList.intro: Race and Trait choices strongly affect progression speed, combat stability, and boss performance. Keep top-tier rolls, use strong mid-tier options, and reroll weak picks when resources allow.

solutions.name: S Tier
solutions.description: Legendary Race and Trait rolls are long-term anchors and should be preserved.

solutions.name: A Tier
solutions.description: High-rarity combat-focused options are great for quests, farming, and early bosses.

solutions.name: B Tier
solutions.description: Mid-rarity rolls are acceptable while building stats and waiting for better resources.

solutions.name: C Tier
solutions.description: Common rolls are functional starters but usually replaced during structured progression.

managementTips: Do not reroll every decent roll just for novelty.
Save spins for upgrades with clear build impact.
Evaluate Race and Trait choices together, not in isolation.
Re-check your setup after each major Soul or Haki upgrade.

animeLimitlessStatsFarmingGuide.title: Anime Limitless Stats Farming Guide
animeLimitlessStatsFarmingGuide.intro: Train through combat, use x2 Stat EXP rewards, and follow a simple early route to grow faster. This Anime Limitless guide turns early grinding into steady stat progress.

cards.name: Start with RELEASE
cards.description: Use the x2 Stat EXP window when you can fight continuously instead of idling in town.

cards.name: Farm through repeated combat
cards.description: Focus on consistent enemy clears and quest completions to stack reliable stat gains.

cards.name: Collect daily and playtime rewards
cards.description: Use login and session rewards to reduce grinding friction and improve build options.

cards.name: Transition to boss loops
cards.description: Move into bosses after your stats, Soul choice, and rolls support consistent clears.

highlights: Rotate Soul checks into farming sessions
Upgrade into bosses with stable clear speed

animeLimitlessHakiGuide.title: Anime Limitless Haki Guide
animeLimitlessHakiGuide.intro: Learn where Armament Haki and Observation Haki fit into Anime Limitless progression. Focus on Haki after your early stats and core build basics are stable.

regions.name: Haki Role in Progression
regions.description: Use Haki as a combat upgrade layer after beginner stat and quest fundamentals.

regions.name: Armament Haki
regions.description: Armament Haki helps when raw damage and survivability need a stronger baseline.

regions.name: Observation Haki
regions.description: Observation Haki supports safer fights when boss pressure and enemy patterns intensify.

regions.name: Best Timing
regions.description: Prioritize Haki once your core farming loop is stable and upgrades start costing more.

animeLimitlessBossesAndDropsGuide.title: Anime Limitless Bosses and Drops Guide
animeLimitlessBossesAndDropsGuide.intro: Bosses are a key mid-game target in Anime Limitless because they reward drops, materials, and build upgrades. Prepare with stats, Souls, Race and Trait rolls, and Haki before repeated farming.

creatures.name: Boss Preparation
creatures.description: Enter boss content after solid stat training, EXP usage, and core build setup.

creatures.name: Boss Essence Tracking
creatures.description: Boss Essence should be tracked separately because it directly supports progression upgrades.

creatures.name: Repeatable Drop Loop
creatures.description: Farm bosses you can clear reliably, then graduate to harder content as efficiency improves.

creatures.name: Post-Run Upgrade Review
creatures.description: After each session, review Soul, Haki, Race, and Trait choices for the next cycle.

creatures.name: Mid-Game Focus
creatures.description: Boss farming becomes the strongest route when basic quest grinding starts tapering off.

animeLimitlessTrelloAndDiscordGuide.title: Anime Limitless Trello and Discord Guide
animeLimitlessTrelloAndDiscordGuide.intro: Use official channels to track Anime Limitless updates, code drops, balance notes, and system details. These links help you check changes fast and plan your next progression steps.

items.name: Official Trello
items.description: Check game systems, progression details, and update documentation.

items.name: Official Discord
items.description: Follow announcements, update alerts, and community-discovered optimizations.

items.name: Roblox Game Page
items.description: Use the official listing to launch the correct game and verify experience identity.

items.name: Roblox Community
items.description: Track developer-linked announcements and related community channels.

items.name: Code Update Sources
items.description: Track active and expired code lists and use the latest redeem steps.

faq.title: Anime Limitless
faq.subtitle: Key answers for Anime Limitless progression, systems, and official resources.

questions.question: How should beginners start Anime Limitless?
questions.answer: Start Anime Limitless by redeeming rewards, farming stats through combat, and following quests before forcing boss fights.

questions.question: How important are Souls in Anime Limitless?
questions.answer: Souls are a core Anime Limitless build system and should be tracked on spawn windows to avoid missing upgrades.

questions.question: When should I focus on Haki in Anime Limitless?
questions.answer: Focus on Haki in Anime Limitless after your early stat route and build basics are stable enough for harder content.

questions.question: Where are the best official Anime Limitless updates posted?
questions.answer: The best official Anime Limitless updates are posted on the Anime Limitless Trello, Anime Limitless Discord, and the official Anime Limitless Roblox page.

cta.title: Ready to Start Anime Limitless?
cta.description: Join the Anime Limitless community for codes, soul updates, and progression tips.
